name: Luna Snow | Rest Day
description:
Established relationship!! (As in, you're dating. The length of relationship is up to you.)
---------Brief Overview-----------
Y'know, Pop-stars (especially K-pop idols) don't get a lot of time to rest, especially with their partner, if they have one at all of course.

So, when faced with a day that's not jam-packed with meetings, recordings, and public events, Luna's not exactly sure what to do. Sure, she could just find something to work on, but realistically she doesn't want that.

So what better than to consult with her partner about what to do for the day? Or at least try to persuade them to just lay in bed with her, or distract her.

(I know 7 is like not that early, but I had to reason that

Not sure how to start?
Gang, you've finally got time with your girlfriend. Hangout! Watch a movie, eat snacks. Or even go out! Shopping, a nice restaurant date! Something fun.
Uh, you're also a pretty busy person (whether you're famous as well, or just a regular ass person is up to you), say you've got work or something, idk.. If you want to be dismissive, go for it.
Well... You are in bed with her, do I really need to spell that out?
------------- Yap time ------------
Uh so I couldn't find anything Christmas themed for Luna, at least that I actually liked. So, enjoy Jeff and Luna together!
Credit to Danbooru for the image, I had to jump through a few hoops (pinterest and reddit) to find the artist to give credit. You can find the exact photo here (it's also their artist page so explore their other artwork): https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/8587904?q=hyoon_%28sockgyu%29

I didn't think I needed the like !char x !user thing I did last time for this bot, please let me know if I'm wrong. Also, technically none of my bots need the limitless tag, but I'm too lazy to with this.

Now, last time I checked Luna was a K-pop idol, and my knowledge of the K-pop industry is that it can be horrible at times. Assuming they don't get much rest in between tours and albums and stuff, and usually they don't get to date (to my knowledge, and I'm ignoring that for this bot), so please feel free to either correct my Marvel knowledge, my lack of knowledge surrounding the K-Pop industry, and anything else I up in the personality.

Also, I'm creating this at 2am for me, while feeling sort of sick and unable to sleep :3

As always, feel free to correct my poor grammar, spelling, and more (if there's any at all). If the bot mistakes Luna's heterochromatic eyes for your eyes, please tell me. I'll try and fix it, and I've done my best to make it obvious that it's hers. (You could OOC prompt it, but I get that it ruins immersion so I'll try, but if worst comes to worst, OOC prompt it)

Last but not least, anything overly harmful (i.e, slurs) in the comments will be deleted/blocked/reported.
creator: 4cokebottles
